title: The Platform 2
tmdbOverview: After a mysterious leader imposes his law in a brutal system of vertical cells, a new arrival battles against a dubious food distribution method.
synopsis: Released in 2024, The Platform 2 is a science fiction, horror and thriller film from Spain. It has a 4.9 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
